ナビゲーション・リンクをスキップ
  • 概要
  • 階層ツリー
  • 非推奨
  • 索引
  • 検索
  • ヘルプ

    すべてのパッケージ

    パッケージの概要
    パッケージ
    説明
    mechanics.analysis
    Analysis snapshots should keep typed runtime identity and avoid embedding report-facing display labels except where the sampled payload itself is presentation data, such as buff display names.
    mechanics.buff
     
    mechanics.data
     
    mechanics.element
     
    mechanics.energy
     
    mechanics.formula
     
    mechanics.optimization
    Optimization is allowed to depend on external profile-file formats through dedicated adapters such as ProfileFileAdapter.
    mechanics.reaction
     
    mechanics.rl
     
    mechanics.rl.bridge
     
    model.artifact
     
    model.character
     
    model.entity
     
    model.entity.state
     
    model.standards
     
    model.stats
     
    model.type
     
    model.weapon
     
    sample
    Sample entry points are allowed to contain simulator bootstrap wiring and human-readable setup code.
    simulation
    The simulation runtime should not depend on profile-file strings or report-specific labels for core control flow.
    simulation.action
     
    simulation.event
     
    simulation.runtime
     
    visualization
    Visualization owns report labels, DOM-safe keys, and HTML-specific view shaping.
